message:
perf: wire IC into switch-dispatch get_field/get_field2 fallback paths

The IC struct was declared but unused — get_field/get_field2 still used
raw JSValue.getPropertyStr (full C FFI + atom hash) on every call for
non-native-shape properties. Now uses zig_runtime.icLoad which caches
shape+offset for O(1) direct property read on cache hit.
